programme.title: 🌊 2.0m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that onshore wind and 2.0m swell, today's Ribeira d'Ilhas will be a choppy, aerobic workout.
🌊 Swell: 2.0m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 16.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.9m @ 12s ONSHORE

programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 2.2m of wind-assisted chaos will likely provide more entertainment for the seagulls than for us.
🌊 Swell: 2.2m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h NNE (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 22.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a 2.1m swell and that wind, today will either be a short, brutal thrashing or surprisingly alright.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.0m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Two meters with offshore wind? Plenty of closeouts guaranteed, but the brave might find a barrel.

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
